purpose_of_use: Writing explanations of the Dual Coordinate Descent SVM algorithm
level_of_dependency: LLM assistance was used for guidance and documentation improvements. The implementation and experimental design were completed and verified by the student.
disclosure_statement: LLM tools (Cursor AI) were used for reading comprehension of the research paper, debugging assistance, and documentation writing. All outputs were reviewed and validated by the author before inclusion in the final submission.
